content.en:
The forces of the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor kept colliding, and they both wanted to take away the Eternal Source Stone Statue, but they were both stopped by the other party.

At this time, the Qinglong Palace Lord and the others also rushed forward, trying to snatch the Eternal Source Stone Statue.

However, at this moment, a hand suddenly tore through the forbidden void and easily took the Eternal Source Stone statue away.

"Who?"

While the Golden Crow Palace Lord was furious, he was also a little frightened.

With so many half-step domain ancestors' power blocking the void, if he wanted to break their blockade and easily break through the forbidden void, what a powerful force was needed, even if his forbidden path stepped into the realm of all things, and his strength stepped into the second step of the half-step domain ancestor, he couldn't do it so easily.

"At the very least, it is a half-step domain ancestor of the third step, and its strength is second only to that of the real domain ancestor!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord guessed.

With such a powerful being, it is definitely not difficult to kill him.

Moreover, he could be sure that the other party was not a powerhouse of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Could it be that it is a certain third-step and half-step domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain?" thought to the Golden Crow Palace Master.

But does Black Wind Mountain have such a powerful existence?

Or maybe the other party itself is hidden in the vast sea realm, and has been hiding behind the scenes.

In short, this person may be from the Black Wind Mountain, or it may be from other forces, or it may even be a loose cultivator.

The Eternal Source Stone Statue was snatched away, and the Golden Crow Palace Lord couldn't sense the existence of the other party, so naturally there was no way to track it.

Even if he could really track it, he wouldn't dare to track it!

Otherwise, once the other party makes a dead move, he may really fall and die.

"Let's go, go back to the Heavenly Emperor's Palace!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord ordered.

Whoa!!

The half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace left, not daring to linger any longer, after all, they had gained a lot this time, and they were afraid of being intercepted and killed by that mysterious powerhouse.

Only by returning to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, even if it is a half-step domain ancestor of the third step, don't think about breaking through the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

After the half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace left, the Miaofa Dao Ancestor spoke: "Let's go back too!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor, Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, they responded to the Dao again and again, and followed the Miaofa Dao Ancestor back to the Black Wind Mountain.

And at this time, many Dao Ancestors were still snatching the treasures that had been scattered everywhere after the five worlds were shattered, and there were even Dao Ancestors who collected the blood of those forbidden creatures, even if they could only collect a trace, it would be a big gain.

Ye Tian was not interested in these remaining treasures, and went back with Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Ye Tian began to sort out the harvest, this time he obtained a large number of forbidden strange objects and a number of forbidden treasures, and also obtained the top forbidden spirit root tree fragments.

In addition, there are also forbidden blood crystals that are more precious.

The Forbidden Blood Crystal could allow the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors to master the power of the Dark Taboo, and he had obtained more than fifty Forbidden Blood Crystals, if he used them to cultivate Dao Ancestors, it would be enough to cultivate more than fifty Supreme Dao Ancestors!

Of course.

Ye Tian will not use all of it to cultivate Dao Ancestor, he also needs to use the Forbidden Blood Crystal to enhance the power of the Dark Taboo, which will be of great help to improve the Forbidden Body.

But this time, the most precious treasure obtained was undoubtedly the Ten Thousand Things Star Sand, and he obtained more than 800 Ten Thousand Things Star Sand, which could completely allow his physical body to reach the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

Of course, refining the Ten Thousand Things Star Sand is a matter after becoming a half-step domain ancestor, and it is not possible to use the All Things Star Sand at the moment.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to use the top-level forbidden spirit root tree to improve his forbidden dao power, and occasionally used the forbidden blood crystal to refine his dark forbidden power, thereby improving the forbidden body.

In this way, years have passed, and hundreds of years have passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time.

Ye Tian's forbidden dao power has improved a lot, and his forbidden body has also been directly refined from seventy to eight to eighty percent realm.

In just a few hundred years, Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot.

this day.

Ye Tian received a summons from the Eternal Dao Ancestor and asked him to go back to the Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian found that his son Ye Xingchen had also received this information, so he returned to Fengshan with his son Ye Xingchen.

----------------------

Xuanxu Ancient Realm, Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen used the Dark King and Earth King Orders to enter the Wind Mountain and meet the Eternal Dao Ancestors.

"I've seen the Eternal Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor!"

"I've seen Gengjin Daozu!"

......

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen greeted the half-step domain ancestors, but they didn't see the Miaofa Dao Ancestors.

"The Dark King, the Earth King, this time I called you back to take you to a place!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Where to go?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Come with me!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen to a black pagoda, which did not have this pagoda in this position before, it must be a newly established pagoda.

Ye Tian found that although this pagoda was not a forbidden weapon, it used a lot of forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures, and even a lot of ores of the level of immortal black gold, completely shielding the perception of divine consciousness.

If he hadn't seen this pagoda with his own eyes, he probably wouldn't have been able to sense the existence of this pagoda.

When Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen entered the inside of the pagoda, they saw a vast void and a statue standing in this void.

"Eternal Source Stone Statue!"

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen were shocked.

At this moment, Ye Tian finally understood that the strong man who snatched the Eternal Source Stone statue was the strong man of Black Wind Mountain.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, this Eternal Source Stone Statue was snatched by our powerhouse of Black Wind Mountain?" Ye Tian said in surprise.

"That's right, it was the Wind Mountain Lord who made the move!" Eternal Dao Ancestor said: "After all, the value of this Eternal Source Stone Statue is too great, and it is even of great help to the Wind Mountain Lord, so the Mountain Lord made a move!"

Ye Tian nodded again and again, this Eternal Source Stone Statue is useful to the Domain Ancestor, even if the Wind Mountain Lord is the Domain Ancestor, he will not let go of this statue, if he doesn't make a move, it will be strange!

Eternal Dao Ancestor said again: "Dark King, Earth King, you are one of the ten kings, so you have 10,000 years of enlightenment time, if you want to continue to meditate here, you need to pay a certain amount of Black Wind Mountain points, this is the rule, even if I enter here to meditate, I also need to pay points!"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Remember, this is not to be divulged, understand?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor admonished.

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen nodded again and again, promising not to leak out.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen did not leave, but practiced here for a period of time.

At the beginning, Ye Tian only had a short period of time to comprehend, and he benefited a lot, if he had been here for 10,000 years, his Forbidden Dao would definitely have made great progress, and he could even easily create a powerful Forbidden Dao Technique.

In short, if he comprehends 10,000 years, his strength will inevitably skyrocket.
